flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Livingston fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (382 → 340).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Livingston rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (68.3% → 81.2%).
